next_steps: Open https://<ct-ip>:9443 for the SafeLine admin UI (accept the self-signed cert).
Retrieve the SafeLine admin password: node apps/hdc-cli/cli.mjs secrets get HDC_SAFELINE_ADMIN_PASSWORD (username admin).
Create an API token in System Management, then: node apps/hdc-cli/cli.mjs secrets set HDC_SAFELINE_API_TOKEN
Run maintain to sync sites[] from config, or query --live to check drift.
For parallel edge: point public DNS/WAN to the SafeLine guest IP (not nginx-waf) for migrated hostnames.
